Fortuna Mining announces intersection of 7.2 g/t Au over 31.5 meters at Séguéla Mine in Côte d’Ivoire. #GoldMining #ExplorationUpdate
news.summary: Fortuna Mining Corp. announced an update on its exploration programs at the Séguéla Mine in Côte d’Ivoire with the disclosure made on March 13, 2025. The company is listed on NYSE as FSM and TSX as FVI.

news.headline: Survey reveals European disinterest in digital euro, raising ECB concerns about adoption. Of 19k respondents, most allocate minimal share to digital euro in hypothetical 10k euro scenario, showing strong preference for existing payment methods. Adoption hurdles include lack of perceived benefits and need for targeted communication. Video-based education could aid in adoption. US lawmakers push against CBDCs, emphasizing importance of stablecoin legislation. Deutsche Börse CEO advocates for permanent digital euro for financial autonomy.
news.summary: European consumers are showing minimal interest in adopting a central bank digital currency (CBDC), as revealed by an ECB working paper surveying 19,000 respondents across 11 euro-area countries. The study found that when hypothetically allocating 10,000 euros, consumers allocated only a small portion to the digital euro, indicating a strong preference for traditional payment methods. The study emphasized the need for targeted communication to address consumer reluctance towards the digital euro, suggesting that video-based education and training could help in its adoption. Meanwhile, US lawmakers are intensifying opposition to CBDCs, with Representative Tom Emmer advocating for pro-stablecoin legislation over CBDCs. Emmer reintroduced the CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act to prevent future US administrations from launching CBDCs.

news.headline: IEA: The latest round of US sanctions on Russia and Iran has yet to significantly disrupt oil loadings.
IEA: Our current balances suggest global oil supply may exceed demand by around 600,00 bpd this year.
Global Sources Hong Kong Shows on April 11-30, 2025, will feature nine sourcing categories, shaping consumer trends globally.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on March 13, 2025, it was announced that the Global Sources Hong Kong Shows will be held from April 11 to April 30, 2025, at the AsiaWorld-Expo in Hong Kong. This event marks the official start of the prime global sourcing season for the first half of 2025. The exhibition will feature nine major sourcing categories and is expected to attract a significant number of international attendees and exhibitors.

news.headline: 'Faith Over Fear' program by leadership coach Eric Gilbert transforms anxiety into confidence in 10 weeks. 90% report improvement in 2 months.
news.summary: An overwhelming 90% of individuals involved in a recent study observed significant improvements in overcoming fear, reducing panic attacks, and enhancing sleep quality within a span of just two months. The study was conducted in Jacksonville, Fla., and was spearheaded by leadership coach Eric Gilbert. Gilbert, known for his expertise in assisting individuals coping with anxiety, shared these promising results.

news.headline: Elon Musk's Starlink secures deals with India's top telecom companies, opening doors to a huge market.
news.summary: The tech tycoon and Trump adviser has enhanced his chances of entering a significant market by securing agreements with the two largest telecom companies in India. This move allows him to tap into a massive market with billions of potential customers, greatly expanding his business opportunities in the region.

news.headline: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. to launch tender offer on T2 Notes due December 2027.
news.summary: Portuguese bank Banco Comercial Português, S.A. has announced its plan to initiate a tender offer for T2 Notes with a maturity date of December 2027. This decision reflects the bank's strategic approach to managing its debt obligations and optimizing its financial position. The tender offer will provide an opportunity for investors holding these notes to participate in the buyback process. This move indicates the bank's commitment to actively addressing its debt portfolio, possibly to improve liquidity or reduce interest expense.

New NFT marketplace Skurpy to launch on March 13th on Tezos, offering innovative features for creators & users.
news.summary: A brand-new social media hub and NFT marketplace called Skurpy is scheduled to debut on March 13th. This platform will incorporate Tezos blockchain technology to provide cutting-edge functionalities for both creators and users.

news.headline: Acer FY2024 net income of NT$5.54B, offers NT$1.7 cash dividend/share. Q4 revenue: NT$66.02B, gross profits: NT$6.95B.
news.summary: A technology company based in Taipei, Acer Inc. (TWSE: 2353), disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024 and the fiscal year 2024 concluding on December 31. During the last quarter, Acer documented consolidated revenues amounting to NT$66.02 billion, alongside gross profits of NT$6.95 billion, reflecting a gross profit margin of 10.5%.

news.headline: Rxulti (brexpiprazole) approved in EU to treat schizophrenia in adolescents ≥13. CHMP opinion in Jan 2025.
news.summary: Brexpiprazole, previously approved for treating schizophrenia in adults, has now been given the green light for use in adolescents aged 13 and above. This approval came after receiving a favorable opinion from the European Medicines Agency's Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) in January 2025. The extension of its indication to include adolescents opens up treatment options for this age group and marks a significant advancement in addressing mental health needs.

news.headline: Dollar General to report Q4 earnings of $1.5/share on $10.26B revenue, missed estimates last 2 qtrs. Shares fell 4.8%.
news.summary: Dollar General Corporation (NYSE:DG) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on Thursday, March 13. Analysts predict earnings of $1.5 per share, down from $1.83 per share last year. The company expects to report revenue of $10.26 billion for the quarter, up from $9.86 billion a year ago. Dollar General has fallen short of profit expectations in the past two quarters. Following this news, Dollar General's stock price dropped 4.8% to close at $74.85 on Wednesday. For more analyst ratings and insights, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.

Ethereum could bounce back with a 29% gain to $2.5K despite recent lows. Traders overreact, boosting rebound potential with resurging network metrics and DeFi dominance.ETH TVL hits 24 million, reclaiming DEX peak with $20.5 billion volumes in bullish signs for price climb. Critics warn of validators' shrinking earnings, despite heightened layer-2 activity and strong institutional ETF support.
news.summary: Ether (ETH) dropped 13% from March 8 to March 11 due to investors shifting to safe assets amid global economic concerns. The US imposed tariffs on Canada, escalating market worries. For ETH to recover to $2,500, it needs a 29% increase from $1,940. Leveraged buyers are crucial for this rebound, as their activity is at a low. Excessive optimism led to a correction, with $235 million in leveraged long positions liquidated during March 10-11. ETH hit a low at $1,744, its lowest since October 2023, but indicators hint at a possible comeback. ETH trades 60% below its Nov 2021 ATH ($4,868) due to increased smart contract competition and subdued demand for NFTs and gaming. However, Ethereum's L2 network has seen growth. Despite bot-driven transactions, L2 operations remain higher than the base layer, signaling efficiency. Ethereum is regaining its spot in DeFi activities, with TVL surging 10% in ETH terms on March 11. Ethereum leads DEX volumes over Solana, and its TVL at 24 million ETH is boosted by growth in staking, lending, and asset tokenization. This strengthens ETH’s potential to hit $2,500 amid a macroeconomic recovery in the near term.

news.headline: Karolinska Development announces AnaCardio's EU patent for drug candidate AC01 as inotropic agent.
news.summary: Karolinska Development AB in Stockholm, Sweden, revealed today that its portfolio company AnaCardio has secured a patent for its drug candidate AC01 to serve as an inotropic agent in the EU. The company's stock (Nasdaq Stockholm: KDEV) witnessed a positive response following this news. This significant milestone showcases AnaCardio's commitment to innovation in the pharmaceutical industry and represents a major advancement in the development of AC01. This patent approval opens up new possibilities for AnaCardio in the European market, marking a momentous achievement for the company.

news.headline: Digital Agriculture Market estimated to reach $51.3 billion globally by 2033 with 10.5% CAGR, driven by government initiatives on smart farming.
news.summary: The promotion of smart farming practices by government initiatives and the integration of digital platforms in agricultural value chains have been driving market expansion. A recent report by Allied Market Research titled "Digital Agriculture Market" indicates this trend. Published on March 13, 2025, in Wilmington, Del., the report highlights the rapid growth in this sector. Key findings reveal that the market is poised for significant expansion, with growth projected at an impressive rate. This signifies a notable shift towards digital technologies in agriculture, representing a considerable opportunity for industry players and stakeholders.

news.headline: Auto tariffs in US are inevitable due to high imports, says Jim Cramer. Trump grants 1-month exemption to automakers post USMCA, sparking concerns. Half of U.S. car sales are imports.
news.summary: President Trump recently delayed tariffs on automobile companies that comply with USMCA rules, giving a one-month exemption after negotiating the agreement. However, CNBC's Jim Cramer stated that tariffs on carmakers were inevitable due to high import volumes. Over half of the cars sold in the US are imports and face minimal tariffs. Trump has long advocated protectionist policies, making these tariffs likely. The delay allowed companies time to strategize, but the eventual tariffs on vehicles and related products seem almost certain.

news.headline: DMEGC's 2024 annual report: Revenue of €2.4 billion, net profit of €238 million, showing slight growth.
news.summary: In Jinhua, China, on March 13, 2025, DMEGC unveiled its annual report for 2024, showcasing impressive financial results. The company reported a total annual revenue of €2.4 billion, along with a net profit attributable to the parent company amounting to €238 million. These numbers represent a minor increase compared to the previous year's figures.

Lucknow Estate in New Hampshire declared the 24th National Historic Landmark, recognized by U.S. Department of the Interior.
news.summary: A historical landmark in Moultonborough, New Hampshire is making headlines as the Lucknow Estate at the Castle in the Clouds has officially been named a National Historic Landmark (NHL) by the U.S. Department of the Interior. This designation is a significant honor for the estate, highlighting its rich historical importance. The Lakes Region Conservation Trust, in conjunction with Castle in the Clouds, played a crucial role in this achievement. This recognition solidifies the estate's status as a key part of American history and heritage.

news.summary: On March 13th, 2025, Virtune, a Swedish digital asset manager and ETP issuer, has reported significant growth in various markets. Their leading ETP, Virtune XRP ETP, has exceeded $110 million in assets under management (AUM).

news.headline: firstcolo invests 250 million euros to build 11,555 sqm data center with 24 MW capacity in Rosbach vor der Höhe.
news.summary: A leading colocation provider, firstcolo GmbH, has announced an investment of 250 million euros in the construction of a new data center in Rosbach vor der Höhe, Germany. Spanning across 11,555 square meters, the data center will have a total capacity of 24 MW. This expansion marks a significant development in the company's operations and signifies a commitment to enhancing their services.

Hybrid Aircraft Market projected to grow from $1.2 billion in 2023 to $13.2 billion by 2030 at CAGR of 41.6%. Faster charging times benefit airlines. Multiple players: Airbus, Embraer, Zeroavia, Textron, Ampaire Inc. Electric motors segment holds significant share, contributing to efficient flight systems.
news.summary: The Hybrid Aircraft Market is projected to grow from USD 1.2 billion in 2023 to a whopping USD 13.2 billion by 2030, showing a remarkable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 41.6%. This surge is attributed to factors like the increasing demand for short haul range connectivity, technological advancements, and the rising need for alternative transportation modes. Hybrid-electric aircraft can revolutionize the industry with their faster charging times, reducing turnaround times at airports and enhancing flight scheduling efficiency. These aircraft cater to regional markets, connecting smaller cities and remote areas without large airport infrastructure. Notable players in the industry include Airbus, Embraer, Zeroavia, Textron Inc., and Ampaire Inc. The market is segmented based on systems, with electric motors projected to hold significant share in 2023. Electric motors are pivotal for propulsion and various aircraft systems, offering benefits like weight reduction and enhanced energy efficiency compared to traditional engines. This shift towards hybrid aircraft signifies a promising future for regional air travel, bolstering connectivity and economic development.

news.headline: TDC NET A/S 2024 Annual Report not for US release.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, it was announced that certain information should not be released, published, or distributed in the United States or to any person in jurisdictions where it is restricted by law or regulation. This directive applies to any form of release, publication, or distribution of the information. It is important to adhere to these restrictions to avoid any legal or regulatory issues.

news.headline: Martela Corporation released its Annual Report for 2024 on March 13, 2025, including Board of Directors’ Report, Financial Statements, and more, all in Finnish and English.
news.summary: The Annual Financial Report of Martela Corporation for the year 2024 was released on March 13, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. The report includes the Board of Directors’ Report, Financial Statements, Auditor’s Report, Corporate Governance Statement, and Remuneration report. These documents have been published in PDF and XHTML formats, and can be accessed on Martela’s website www.martela.com. The reports are provided in both Finnish and English languages for stakeholders and interested parties to review.
